name: flow-06-branch-b-tier-content-feed
description: Branch B: T105 TierContentSelector (query-layer tier filter) → T106 FeedPopulator. T105 triggers on MembershipActivated. Time-decoupled from Branch A gate.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T105 query-layer tier filter (content_access_level IN accessLevels[]), cursor ceiling 50
Retrieve tier-gated-content-query pattern for FLOW-06 Branch B
Break into: T105 (BuildSearchFilter with tier filter + cursor 50) + T106 (feed population store)
Generate tier-content-selector.service.ts (T105) and feed-populator.service.ts (T106). T105 query includes content_access_level IN accessLevels[].
Named check: config_over_hardcode (cursor ceiling from FREEDOM), store_before_enqueue, tenant_id_on_writes
Score against iron rules: query-layer filter, cursor ceiling
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate

entry: MembershipActivated event (time-decoupled from Branch A gate)
